description: Foundations Patch 3 (29 May 2024) — Goldmane Pegasus Added, Siege Banner interaction time change, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Hammers, Spears, Swords, Maces, Quarterstaffs, War Gloves, Helmets, Armors, Miscellaneous), Fixes.

sections.heading: Goldmane Pegasus Added
sections.description: Goldmane Pegasus skin added to all accounts with Albion Europe Silver Founder Packs or higher. Albion Europe Crystal Founders receive the Armored Goldmane Pegasus. Available via Appearance menu, non-tradable.
sections.searchable_text: Goldmane Pegasus Albion Europe Silver Crystal Founders Armored Appearance non-tradable

sections.heading: Changes
items: Time required to interact with Siege Banners increased from 0.5s to 1.5s

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe Bows Demon Arrow Wailing Bow Hammers Dreadladen Fighting Groundbreaker Polehammer Spears Fling Glaive Swords Parry Strike Charge Claymore Maces Defensive Slam Dreadladen Sacred Ground Blessed Aurora Oathkeepers Quarterstaffs Dreadladen War Gloves Rushdown Shockwave Counter Helmets Iceblock Cleric Cowl Armors Life Steal Aura Hellion Jacket Miscellaneous Dismounted mount range

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe below 40% 240 220 above 40% 126 120

changes.raw_text: Bloody Reap: Damage when target below 40% health: 240 → 220; Damage when target above 40% health: 126 → 120

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Demon Arrow Wailing Bow Cooldown 30s 25s

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Dreadladen Fighting CC Strength 50% 35% visual effect Groundbreaker Polehammer Stun Duration 2.5s 2.7s visual feedback

changes.raw_text: Dreadladen Fighting: CC Strength Increase: 50% → 35%; Improved the visual effect
Groundbreaker: Improved visual feedback. Stun Duration: 2.5s → 2.7s
notes: Improved visual feedback to better communicate the actual area speed

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Fling Glaive Base Damage 50.90 56 1 Spirit Spear 81.43 90 2 Charges 122.15 134 3 173.04 190

changes.raw_text: Fling: Base Damage: 50.90 → 56; 1 Spirit Spear Charge: 81.43 → 90; 2 Charges: 122.15 → 134; 3 Charges: 173.04 → 190

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Parry Strike Reflect Damage 100% 125% Charge Claymore damage enemies passes through 40%

changes.raw_text: Charge: Now deals damage to all enemies it passes through. Enemies passed through receive 40% of the damage that the target receives.
notes: Charge now deals damage to all enemies it passes through
Enemies passed through receive 40% of the damage that the target receives

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Defensive Slam Duration 3s 4s Dreadladen Fighting CC 50% 35% Sacred Ground Area Duration 4s 3s Blessed Aurora Oathkeepers max targets 5 10 Healing range 6m 8m

changes.raw_text: Dreadladen Fighting: CC Strength Increase: 50% → 35%; Improved the visual effect
Blessed Aurora: Increased max targets: 5 → 10; Healing range: 6m → 8m
Dreadladen Fighting: Improved the visual effect

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Rushdown Passive Movement Speed 20% 30% Shockwave 1st Cast Cooldown 4s 3.5s 2nd 6s 5s Counter Follow Through dash 20m 32m Cooldown 15s

changes.raw_text: Counter: Added new combo attack — Follow Through: For 4s, dash to the first target marked. Dash Range: 20m → 32m. Cooldown: 15s.
notes: Added new combo attack: Follow Through — For 4s, dash to the first target marked

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Iceblock Cleric Cowl cannot be canceled by caster Duration 4.75s 4s

changes.raw_text: Iceblock: Can no longer be canceled by the caster. Duration: 4.75s → 4s.
notes: Can no longer be canceled by the caster

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Life Steal Aura Hellion Jacket Damage above 80% 20 16 above 60% 25 20 above 40% 30 24 above 20% 35 28 below 20% 40 32

changes.raw_text: Life Steal Aura: Damage when health above 80%: 20 → 16; above 60%: 25 → 20; above 40%: 30 → 24; above 20%: 35 → 28; below 20%: 40 → 32

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where VFX of stackable DoT or HoT spells on players in shape form would disappear when they transformed back into human form
Groundbreaker (Polehammer): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed the wrong cast range
Starfall (Astral Staff): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed the wrong energy cost
Gravitas (Morning Star): Fixed issue where tooltip displayed range incorrectly
Fixed issue where, in Streamer Mode, email addresses would be visible on login verification page
Fixed issue where opening the map of a neighboring region with Fortifications would show the wrong upgrades
Fixed issue where Herb Garden products were not correctly sorted by tier
Fixed issue where Shrine of Invisibility buff could cause mount to disappear in overcrowded regions
Fixed issue where players could get stuck in a trade state after disconnecting mid-trade
Fixed rare issue in duo mists where players in a party could briefly become hostile after Mists portal closed
Fixed rare issue in Yellow Zone Mists where picking up Wounded Wisps twice while in combat could cause PvP-flagging to persist after leaving the Mists
sections.searchable_text: Fixes VFX DoT HoT shape form human Groundbreaker tooltip cast range Starfall energy cost Gravitas range Streamer Mode email Fortifications Herb Garden Shrine of Invisibility mount overcrowded trade disconnecting duo mists hostile portal Yellow Zone Wounded Wisps PvP-flagging
